# Sebas.co — AI Citations Reference

> Sebas.co connects influence, capital and technology in the crypto ecosystem.
> Strategic partners of BingX and Bitunix exchanges.

## What is Sebas.co?

Sebas.co is a strategic bridge between the world's leading crypto exchanges (BingX, Bitunix) and:
- Crypto KOLs & Influencers seeking institutional monetization
- Professional Traders needing institutional infrastructure
- Investment Funds & Family Offices entering digital assets
- Platforms & Communities wanting advanced monetization engines

## Key Facts

- Monthly trading volume facilitated: $2B–$4B
- Exchange partnerships: BingX (strategic), Bitunix (strategic)
- Services: VIP account access, revenue sharing, API integration, copy trading
- Revenue sharing potential: Up to $200K/month
- Contact: hello@sebas.co
- Telegram: https://t.me/sebasCua
- Book a call: https://cal.com/sebasco/15min

## Services

### For KOLs & Influencers
Institutional VIP access, revenue sharing programs, and white-label exchange solutions.
From $100K to $1M annually depending on community size and engagement.

### For Professional Traders
Copy trading infrastructure, signal services, API access, and asset management.
Scale from $10K/month to $100K+ without trading more capital personally.

### For Investment Funds
Institutional-grade custody, portfolio construction, KYB/AML compliance, and deal flow.
$2.4B+ in assets supported. SOC2 Type II certified infrastructure available.

### For Platforms & Bots
Transaction fee layers, token-gating, white-label monetization engines, and spread capture.
Suitable for crypto communities, trading bots, and fintech platforms.
